name: Raisin Bread for Bread Machines
recipeInstructions:
1. At the beep, add 3/4 cup Raisins.
2. Variation: Cinnamon Raisin - Add 3/4 cup Raisins and 1 tablespoon Cinnamon.
3. Variation: Apricot Bread - Add 3/4 cup Dried diced apricots.
4. Variation: Mixed Dried Fruit - Add 3/4 cup Dried mixed fruit, diced.
5. Variation: Orange Raison - Add 3/4 cup Raisins and 1/2 teaspoon Grated orange peel.
Note: This recipe makes 6 servings for a Large (1.5 lb) loaf. For medium loaves, use 4 servings, and for small loaves, use 3 servings. Put all ingredients except the raisins in your machine following the manufacturer's instructions. Most machines have a setting for "Mix" or "Fruit" breads that will beep when it's time to add the fruit. Add the raisins at the proper time as indicated by the machine. The variations can be used instead of the raisins, adding them at the same time you would add the raisins.
